fake_gt_provenance.details: Gate 3 gold_solver in LOO and Gate3-off tests is the same implementation class (PreferenceSolver/BNReferenceSolver) as the compiler output. NB/HMM gold is deterministic hand-written closed-form. test_equivalence_full.py compares two independent in-repo implementations (BLInD 900/900, Flight 250/250 pass locally) but does not cover TextBandit 50/50 claim.

se_optimism.details: CI methods inconsistent (Clopper-Pearson in compute_ci.py, bootstrap in run_e2e_experiment.py, Wilson in verify_bnlearn_dsl_100.py). Paper text mixes 'Wilson'/'Wilson/Clopper-Pearson'. n=6 LOO point estimate only; 95% exact CI lower bound ~54.1% (CP) or ~61.0% (Wilson) not disclosed.

nested_leakage.details: LOO test induction set and verification set both use samples[:k] — overlapping. Inductor prompt json.dumps full sample including reward_fn/answers/correct_diagnosis fields. Prompt template explicitly instructs LLM to read reward_fn. Gate 2 preference has passed=True (no threshold). NB/HMM does not go through TaskSpec/compiler (valid_families set excludes them) — paper claims are mechanism-wise incorrect.

metric_mixing.details: Cross-baseline 'correct' targets inconsistent: compile-time/PCD uses gold_solver_rec, PAL uses user_idx, E2E uses gold_user_choice AND gold_solver_match (two metrics). Paper compares these as if same denominator. verify_bnlearn_dsl_100.py contains dsl_p = gold_p fallback for multi-valued nodes, auto-satisfying 100%. bnlearn_openai_gpt-5.4_*211432.json only has PAL results — no 'DSL 100%' raw artifact found.

claims.note: mechanism mismatch: not inductor compositional generalization but independent codegen baseline
same-solver self-reference + overlapping induction/verify + prompt answer leakage
ablation invalidated by vacuous Gate2 preference + same-solver gold
parse-successful cases only; not all gaps are malformed JSON

reruns_required: LOO 6/6 with disjoint train/val/test, independent gold solver, Gate2 preference threshold, CI disclosure
bnlearn 4 networks with pgmpy gold and fixed verify_bnlearn_dsl_100.py (no dsl_p=gold_p fallback)
NB/HMM either extend TaskSpec/compiler to support them OR rewrite claims as independent codegen baseline
scope_qualifiers_needed: L108/L188-198: decide stage trivial under gold injection
L84/L114/L123/L547-580: independent core-ops-constrained codegen baseline (not inductor/compiler)
L254: for implemented VE-compiled BLInD solver
L340: for implemented compiler families Flight/BLInD with verified equivalence
L602: per-feature exact match among parse-successful cases
eval_type: mixed (deterministic_compile_with_non_independent_gold for LOO/Gate3, deterministic_gold for equivalence test, human_handwritten_closed_form for NB/HMM)
